title: Bobotie with an apple crumble topping
excerpt: If I can grow old like Min, I'll be a happy woman. Feminine, beautiful and sharp is she. It was such a great honour to be able to cook for her.

seo.title: Bobotie with an apple crumble topping - Marinda Kook

html: If I can grow old like Min, I'll be a happy woman.   Feminine, beautiful and sharp is she.  It was such a great honour to be able to cook for her.

recipe.title: Bobotie with an apple crumble topping
recipe.author: Marinda Engelbrecht

items: salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

ingredientGroups.title: Apple layer
items: 250 ml golden sultanas, soaked in rooibos tea

steps: Pour a small amount of oil into a saucepan and fry the onions until soft and translucent.
Add curry powder, turmeric and cumin and fry together.
Add the mince and fry until it just starts to colour.
Mix the rest of the ingredients in a jug and then pour it over the meat.
Let it simmer for about 10 minutes and then pour it into an oven dish.

directionGroups.title: Apple layer
steps: Slowly cook all the ingredients for the apple layer together until it becomes thick.
Mash it and spoon evenly over the meat layer in the oven dish.

directionGroups.title: Top crust
steps: Mix all the ingredients well until it looks like sand.
Crumble it over the apple layer.
Bake the bobotie for 30 minutes until the crust turns a nice golden brown.
